info.title: Notification Employee API
info.description: Production API contract for the employee task management, live location tracking, assignment reply, notification device token, and authentication endpoints.

get.description: Employee-only endpoint returning the latest pending or active assignment, or null.

403.description: Employee role required or user inactive.

patch.description: Employee-only. The assignment must belong to the authenticated employee.

403.description: Employee role required or user inactive.

rejection_reason.example: I am unavailable for this schedule.

403.description: Employee role required or user inactive.

patch.description: Employee-only. Only active assignments can be completed.

403.description: Employee role required, user inactive, or policy denied.

409.description: Only active assignments can be completed.

post.description: Authenticate an active user and issue a Laravel Sanctum bearer token. Rate limited to 10 attempts per minute per IP.

403.description: Account is deactivated.
Inactive user.

post.description: Register or update the authenticated user FCM device token.

403.description: Inactive user.

delete.description: Remove an FCM device token from the authenticated user.

403.description: Inactive user.

get.description: Return the authenticated user profile using UserResource.

403.description: Inactive user.

post.description: Admin-only. Starts a live tracking session for selected active employees or all active employees when employee_ids is omitted.

403.description: Admin role required or user inactive.

get.description: Admin-only live location report for all employees with a current live location row.

403.description: Admin role required or user inactive.

get.description: Admin-only live location report for a single employee user ID.

403.description: Admin role required or user inactive.

404.description: Location not found for this employee.

post.description: Employee-only batched tracking update for an active tracking session. Points must be a list of 1 to 500 entries.

403.description: Employee role required or user inactive.

post.description: Employee-only legacy single-point location submission. Deprecated in favor of POST /api/location/sync.

403.description: Employee role required or user inactive.

get.description: Admins may view replies for any assignment. Employees may view replies for their own assignments.

403.description: Inactive user or policy denied.

post.description: Employee-only. The assignment must belong to the authenticated employee and be active.

403.description: Employee role required, user inactive, or policy denied.

get.description: Authenticated admins receive all tasks; employees receive only tasks assigned to them. This endpoint is not paginated.

403.description: Inactive user.

post.description: Admin-only task creation. All selected users must be active employees. Returns 409 when selected employees have conflicting active assignments.

403.description: Admin role required or user inactive.

get.description: Admin-only paginated task listing with search and filters.

403.description: Admin role required or user inactive.

get.description: Admins can view any task. Employees can only view assigned tasks; unauthorized employee access returns 404 to avoid ID enumeration.

403.description: Inactive user.
Admin role required or user inactive.

409.description: Completed or cancelled task cannot be changed.

403.description: Admin role required or user inactive.

409.description: Completed or cancelled task cannot be changed.

403.description: Admin role required or user inactive.

409.description: Completed or cancelled task cannot be changed.

patch.description: Admin-only. Only pending tasks can be activated.

403.description: Admin role required or user inactive.

409.description: Only pending tasks can be activated.

delete.description: Admin-only soft delete. Pending or active tasks are cancelled before deletion.

403.description: Admin role required or user inactive.
Admin role required or user inactive.

get.description: Admin-only paginated employee list. Supports search by name, email, or phone, and active status filtering.

403.description: Admin role required or user inactive.

post.description: Admin-only employee creation. The response intentionally returns the plain generated password value supplied in the request.

403.description: Admin role required or user inactive.
Admin role required or user inactive.

get.description: Admin-only employee detail. Non-employee users bound to this route return 404.

403.description: Admin role required or user inactive.
Admin role required or user inactive.
Admin role required or user inactive.
Admin role required or user inactive.
Admin role required or user inactive.

post.description: Deletes selected employee users. All IDs must belong to employees.

403.description: Admin role required or user inactive.

message.example: Forbidden. You do not have permission to access this resource.
The requested resource was not found.

bearerAuth.description: Sanctum bearer token. Use a token returned by POST /api/auth/login, for example: 1|example_token_value.

tags.name: Tasks
tags.description: Task listing, creation, updates, activation, cancellation, and deletion.

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: FCM device token registration and removal.
